meta.title: Day 2 Recap - AI Engineer World's Fair
meta.description:
Tip: If you subscribe here on YouTube, click the bell to be notified of new vids

Work for Trelis: https://trelis.com/jobs/

Apply for a Trelis Grant: https://trelis.com/trelis-ai-grants/

📧 Get Trelis AI Tutorials by Email
Subscribe on Substack: https://trelis.substack.com

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Greg Brockman says Basic Research is Back.
1:10 Simon Willison Evals with Pelicans.
2:45 Dylan Patel - Western AI Powered by the Middle East.
3:51 2x Faster Separating Pre-fill and Decode .
4:51 ASICs are the future of GPUs?
6:12 Raise $20M but only hire 10 people.
6:52 Is it a good think Windsurf was acquired?
